Container.Name: psvault
Container.Overview:
P.S. Vault is a self-hostable dead man's switch. Create encrypted vaults containing passwords, accounts, documents, and anything else your loved ones may need. If you stop checking in, your vaults are automatically delivered to the people you trust.
Zero-knowledge encryption — your data is encrypted in your browser before it ever reaches the server. The server only stores ciphertext.
P.S. Vault requires three containers (web, api, database). The recommended installation is via Docker Compose: https://github.com/anieto/ps-vault/blob/main/docker/compose.yml
Copy .env.example to .env, fill in your values, then run: docker compose -f docker/compose.yml up -d
Container.Description: Self-hostable encrypted vault with dead man's switch. Zero-knowledge encryption. Delivers encrypted vaults to trusted beneficiaries if you stop checking in. Requires psvault-api and psvault-db — use Docker Compose for the full stack.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Port to access the P.S. Vault web interface.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: The public URL where P.S. Vault is accessible, e.g. https://vault.yourdomain.com (no trailing slash).

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Long random string for signing JWT tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Encryption Pepper
Config.Description: Long random string added to all key derivation. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. Back this up — losing it makes recovery impossible.

Config.Name: SMTP Port
Config.Description: SMTP port. 587 for STARTTLS, 465 for TLS.

Config.Name: SMTP From Address
Config.Description: From address for outgoing emails, e.g. noreply@yourdomain.com

Config.Name: SMTP TLS Mode
Config.Description: TLS mode for SMTP: none | starttls | tls

Config.Name: Registration Mode
Config.Description: Who can register: open | invite | closed

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Email of the first admin account. Auto-promoted on first registration.

Config.Name: Max File Size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum file upload size in megabytes.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Unraid default is 99.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Unraid default is 100.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Path for P.S. Vault configuration data.
